note: Lane D5: The lane spec listed 8 files but 5 had no Drizzle calls — only Effect.all(), sync.run(), skill.all(), or git.run(). The regex-based grep at the start picked up false positives. This is a recurring pattern: when scanning for Drizzle .all()/.run(), need to explicitly exclude non-Drizzle .all/.run variants. Lesson registered.
